APERNAME.description: S&OC PRD aperture name used for telescope pointing

ASNPOOL.description: Name of the association pool file used as pipeline input

ASNTABLE.description: Name of the association table from which this product was created

BARTDELT.description: Calculated barycentric time correction from UTC (seconds)

BITPIX.description: Number of bits per data pixel

BKGDTARG.description: Exposure is flagged as a background target

BKGLEVEL.description: Overall background signal level computed by the skymatch pipeline step

BKGSUB.description: Background signal from BKGLEVEL has been subtracted (T or F)

BSCALE.description: Linear scaling factor for data values

BUNIT.description: Physical unit of the data array values

BZERO.description: Zero point offset for data values

CCCSTATE.description: MIRI contamination control cover state (OPEN, CLOSED, LOCKED)

CMD_TSEL.description: SCE test pattern: COLUMNS, ROWS, FRAMES, or ALL

CONT_ID.description: Continuation of the specified previous program number

CRDS_CTX.description: Version of the CRDS context (PMAP) controlling reference file selection

CRDS_VER.description: Version of the CRDS client software used for reference file selection

CROWDFLD.description: FGSes operating in a crowded star field

CRVAL1.description: Coordinate value at reference pixel on axis 1

CRVAL2.description: Coordinate value at reference pixel on axis 2

DATAMODE.description: Post-processing method used in FPAP; maps to readout pattern (0–86)

DATAPROB.description: Science telemetry indicated data problems (T or F)

DETECTOR.description: Detector used to acquire the data

DETMODE.description: Detector mode: FLUSH_MODE, TEST_PATTERN, CLOCKING, or EXPOSURE

DITHOPFR.description: Dither optimization type: POINT-SOURCE or EXTENDED-SOURCE

DRPFRMS1.description: Number of frames dropped prior to first integration

DRPFRMS3.description: Number of frames dropped between integrations

DSETSTRT.description: Starting set number of the 4-point dither sets (1–10)

DURATION.description: Total duration of exposure: integration time × number of integrations (seconds)

EFFEXPTM.description: Effective exposure time corrected for dead time (seconds)

ENGQLPTG.description: Source and quality of spacecraft pointing keywords

ENG_QUAL.description: Engineering database quality flag (OK or SUSPECT)

ERRTYPE.description: Type of values in the error array (ERR, IERR, VAR, IVAR)

EXPCOUNT.description: Monotonically increasing exposure count within a visit

EXPRIPAR.description: Exposure is PRIME, PARALLEL_COORDINATED, or PARALLEL_PURE

EXPSTENG.description: UTC exposure start time from engineering data stream

EXP_ONLY.description: Exposure taken through special commanding without SI configuration

EXSEGNUM.description: Sequential segment number within a TSO single exposure

EXSEGTOT.description: Total number of segments in a TSO single exposure

FA1VALUE.description: Requested focus actuator 1 absolute position value

FA2VALUE.description: Requested focus actuator 2 absolute position value

FA3VALUE.description: Requested focus actuator 3 absolute position value

FAM_LA1.description: FAM primary sensor measured position of linear actuator 1 (steps)

FAM_LA2.description: FAM primary sensor measured position of linear actuator 2 (steps)

FAM_LA3.description: FAM primary sensor measured position of linear actuator 3 (steps)

FAPHASE1.description: Requested focus actuator 1 starting phase per exposure specification

FAPHASE2.description: Requested focus actuator 2 starting phase per exposure specification

FAPHASE3.description: Requested focus actuator 3 starting phase per exposure specification

FASTAXIS.description: Axis and direction of fast detector readout (±1 or ±2)

FASTEP1.description: Requested focus actuator 1 starting steps per exposure specification

FASTEP2.description: Requested focus actuator 2 starting steps per exposure specification

FASTEP3.description: Requested focus actuator 3 starting steps per exposure specification

FAUNIT1.description: Requested focus actuator 1 starting units per exposure specification

FAUNIT2.description: Requested focus actuator 2 starting units per exposure specification

FAUNIT3.description: Requested focus actuator 3 starting units per exposure specification

FCSRLPOS.description: NIRSpec RMA relative position in motor steps (-18400 to +18400)

FILETYPE.description: Type of data in the file

FOCUSPOS.description: FGS focus mechanism position in millimeters (-4.0 to 4.0)

FRMDIVSR.description: Frame divisor used on-board when averaging multiple frames into a group

FXD_SLIT.description: NIRSpec fixed slit aperture name (S200A1, S200A2, S200B1, S400A1, S1600A1)

GAINFACT.description: Data scaling factor ratio between gain=2 and nominal gain=1

GDSTARID.description: Guide Star Catalog 2 identifier (10 character, base-36)

GROUPGAP.description: Number of frames skipped between groups

GSENDTIM.description: UTC end time of guide star acquisition activity

GSSTRTTM.description: Observatory UTC time when guide star activity started

GS_DEC.description: ICRS declination of the guide star (degrees)

GS_MAG.description: Guide star magnitude in FGS detector

GS_ORDER.description: Index of this guide star within the list of selected guide stars

GS_RA.description: ICRS right ascension of the guide star (degrees)

GS_UDEC.description: ICRS declination uncertainty of the guide star (arcsec)

GS_URA.description: ICRS right ascension uncertainty of the guide star (arcsec)

GS_V3_PA.description: V3 position angle of the guide star at the guide star location (degrees)

GWA_PXAV.description: NIRSpec grating wheel REC-averaged calibrated X-tilt value

GWA_PYAV.description: NIRSpec grating wheel REC-averaged calibrated Y-tilt value

GWA_TILT.description: NIRSpec grating wheel temperature sensor calibrated value

GWA_XP_V.description: NIRSpec grating wheel X-position tilt sensor calibrated value

GWA_XTIL.description: NIRSpec grating wheel averaged X-tilt sensor value

GWA_YP_V.description: NIRSpec grating wheel Y-position tilt sensor calibrated value

GWA_YTIL.description: NIRSpec grating wheel averaged Y-tilt sensor value

HELIDELT.description: Calculated heliocentric time correction from UTC (seconds)

HGA_MOVE.description: High Gain Antenna moved during data collection

INSTRUME.description: Instrument used to acquire the data

INTARGET.description: At least one exposure in the visit is internally targeted

INTEND.description: Number of the last integration in a segmented exposure product

INTSTART.description: Number of the first integration in a segmented exposure product

IS_IMPRT.description: Exposure flagged as a leakcal or imprint exposure

IS_PSF.description: Exposure intended as a PSF reference observation

LAMP.description: Internal lamp state for all science instruments

LATPOLE.description: Native latitude of the celestial pole

LONPOLE.description: Native longitude of the celestial pole

MASTERBG.description: Name of the 1-D master background spectrum file used in pipeline

MIRNFRMS.description: MIRI flight system number of frames

MIRNGRPS.description: MIRI flight system number of groups

MJD-AVG.description: Modified Julian Date of exposure midpoint

MJD-BEG.description: Modified Julian Date of exposure start

MJD-END.description: Modified Julian Date of exposure end

MJD-MID.description: Modified Julian Date of exposure midpoint

MJD-OBS.description: Modified Julian Date of observation start

MODULE.description: NIRCam module used (A, B, or MULTIPLE)

MRSPRCHN.description: MIRI MRS channel for which dither is optimized

MSACONID.description: Unique identifier of all MSA configurations within a visit

MSAMETID.description: Unique identifier within a visit for MSA configuration collection

MSASTATE.description: NIRSpec MSA state: ALLOPEN, ALLCLOSED, or CONFIGURED

MU_DEC.description: Proper motion of the target in Dec from APT (arcsec/year)

MU_EPOCH.description: Epoch of the proper motion values

MU_RA.description: Proper motion of the target in RA from APT (arcsec/year)

NEXPOSUR.description: Total number of planned exposures in the visit

NFRAMES.description: Number of frames in a group

NINTS.description: Number of integrations within the exposure

NOD_TYPE.description: NIRSpec MSA nod pattern type (NONE, 2-, 3-, or 5-SHUTTER-SLITLET)

NOUTPUTS.description: Number of detector amplifier outputs used (1, 4, or 5)

NRESETS.description: Number of resets separating integrations within an exposure

NRIMDTPT.description: NIRISS direct image dither number of points

NRSTSTRT.description: Number of resets at the start of exposure

NRS_NORM.description: Number of normal pixels per block in NIRSpec IRS2 readout

NRS_REF.description: Number of interleaved reference pixels per block in NIRSpec IRS2 readout

NSAMPLES.description: Number of A/D samples per pixel read

NUMDTHPT.description: Total number of points in the entire dither pattern

NWFSEST.description: Exposure start time from the next WFS exposure (MJD)

OBSFOLDR.description: APT observation folder name containing this observation

OPMODE.description: NIRSpec lamp operating mode (MSASPEC, IFU, IMAGE, FIXEDSLIT, etc.)

OSF_FILE.description: Observatory Status File name for this exposure

OSS_VER.description: Version number of the OSS software

PATTNPTS.description: MIRI imaging number of points in CYCLING dither pattern (≥3)

PATTSIZE.description: NIRCam/NIRISS dither pattern size (NONE, SMALL, MEDIUM, LARGE)

PATTSTRT.description: MIRI imaging starting point in the dither cycling pattern (1–311)

PATTTYPE.description: Dither pattern type (FULL, INTRAMODULE, INTRASCA, NONE, etc.)

PA_V3.description: Position angle of the V3 axis (degrees)

PCOUNT.description: Number of bytes of supplemental data (parameter count)

PCS_MODE.description: Pointing Control System mode (FINEGUIDE, COARSE, TRACK, MOVING, NONE)

PILIN.description: Pupil imaging lens in use (T or F)

PIXAR_A2.description: Nominal pixel area in arcsec squared

PPS_APER.description: Original aperture name as supplied by PPS in the PPS_DB

PREIMAGE.description: Name of reference image used to measure position for this source

PRIDTPTS.description: Number of points in FGS primary dither pattern

PRIDTYPE.description: NIRCam primary dither specification with number of points

PWFSEET.description: Exposure end time from the previous WFS exposure (MJD)

RA_V1.description: Right ascension of the V1 axis (degrees)

READPATT.description: Readout pattern name (pre-defined NFRAMES, GROUPGAP, NRESETS combination)

RMA_POS.description: NIRSpec Refocus Mechanism Assembly latest hall-position sensor value

ROIS.description: Radius of the region of interest in spatial dimensions (arcsec)

ROIW.description: Radius of the region of interest in wavelength dimension (arcsec)

ROOTNAME.description: Root name of the observation set

SCATFILE.description: Source catalog filename generated by the source_catalog pipeline step

SELFREF.description: Coronagraphic observation is a self-referencing PSF survey

SEQ_ID.description: Parallel sequence identifier within a group

SIMPLE.description: File conforms to the FITS standard

SLOWAXIS.description: Axis and direction of slow detector readout (±1 or ±2)

SMGRDPAT.description: NIRCam small grid dither pattern name

SPATNSTP.description: MIRI LRS number of steps in the spatial direction

SPATSTEP.description: MIRI LRS distance between steps in the spatial direction (arcsec)

SPAT_NUM.description: MIRI LRS position number within spatial steps

SPCOFFST.description: MIRI LRS spectral offset from pattern starting position (arcsec)

SPECNSTP.description: MIRI LRS number of steps in the spectral direction

SPECSTEP.description: MIRI LRS distance between steps in the spectral direction (arcsec)

SPEC_NUM.description: MIRI LRS position number within spectral steps

SPTOFFST.description: MIRI LRS spatial offset from pattern starting position (arcsec)

SRCTYAPT.description: APT source type for spectroscopy: POINT, EXTENDED, or UNKNOWN

SUBARRAY.description: Subarray name (FULL or named subarray up to 9 characters)

SUBCAT.description: Program sub-category (FGS, MIRI, NIRCAM, NIRISS, NIRSPEC, SC)

SUBPXPAT.description: NIRCam subpixel dither pattern type (STANDARD, SMALL-GRID-DITHER, NONE)

SUBPXPTS.description: Number of points in FGS subpixel dither pattern

SUBSIZE1.description: Number of pixels in the full science frame axis 1 direction

SUBSIZE2.description: Number of pixels in the full science frame axis 2 direction

SUBSTRT1.description: Starting pixel in the full science frame axis 1 direction

SUBSTRT2.description: Starting pixel in the full science frame axis 2 direction

TARGNAME.description: Target name as specified in the proposal

TARGOOPP.description: Visit scheduled as a target of opportunity

TARGPROP.description: Proposer-preferred name for the target (2–31 characters)

TARGTYPE.description: Target type: FIXED, MOVING, or GENERIC

TARGURA.description: Target right ascension uncertainty at mid-exposure (arcsec)

TCATFILE.description: Tweakreg catalog filename used for image alignment

TELAPSE.description: Total elapsed exposure time in seconds

TELESCOP.description: Telescope used to acquire the data

TEXPTIME.description: Total exposure time of all pointings in a resampled product (seconds)

TFRAME.description: Time between start of successive frames (seconds)

TGROUP.description: Time between start of successive groups (seconds)

TIMESYS.description: Principal time system for time-related keywords

TSOVISIT.description: Visit uses Time Series Observation special requirement

VISITEND.description: Observatory UTC time when the visit completed

VISITGRP.description: Visit group identifier for parallel synchronization

VSTSTART.description: Observatory UTC time when the visit started

WCSAXES.description: Number of World Coordinate System axes

WPOWER.description: Weighting power controlling distance weighting for IFU spaxels

WTYPE.description: Type of weighting used when combining IFU point cloud fluxes

XOFFSET.description: X offset from pattern starting position in SI ideal frame (arcsec)

YOFFSET.description: Y offset from pattern starting position in SI ideal frame (arcsec)

ZEROFRAM.description: Zero frame was read separately (T or F)
